--- IMAGES ---

IMAGE 1:
URL: https://www.nltk.org/images/datatypes.png
DESCRIPTION: The content presents a structured comparison between lexical resources, such as dictionaries and verb paradigms, and text analysis methods, including time series data and POS tagging, highlighting the different ways linguistic data can be organized and analyzed.

IMAGE 2:
URL: https://laoret.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/image-1024x727-1.jpg
DESCRIPTION: The infographic depicts a process of linguistic coding in data analysis, illustrating how a museum uses a team of linguists applying linguistic coding to open-ended questions such as visitor feedback surveys and global multilingual questions to gather measurable results.

IMAGE 3:
URL: https://slideplayer.org/slide/4818859/15/images/1/Linguistic+analysis+Data+Linguistic+method.jpg
DESCRIPTION: None

IMAGE 4:
URL: https://pressbooks.ric.edu/app/uploads/sites/2/2022/09/codes-themes-descriptors.jpg
DESCRIPTION: The content outlines three categories: Codes, which convey central ideas of text segments; Themes, discussing general concepts in texts; and Descriptors, highlighting characteristics of entire texts or their creators.

IMAGE 5:
URL: https://letsdatascience.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/Word-Embedding.webp
DESCRIPTION: The image illustrates a word embedding model with a three-dimensional vector space where concepts like "KING," "MAN," "WOMAN," and "QUEEN" are represented as colored points, demonstrating how semantic relationships are captured through spatial proximity.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

enriched_points.expanded_content: Data coding involves systematically labeling linguistic elements, enabling structured categorization that facilitates both quantitative and qualitative analyses of the linguistic landscape.
Through careful examination, researchers uncover recurring patterns and overarching themes, providing insights into cultural significance and social dynamics within the linguistic landscape.
This process entails juxtaposing linguistic data from diverse environments, revealing contextual variations and commonalities that inform broader sociolinguistic theories and practices.
